required_operator_inputs: repair the stranded Explaino family-axis control surface so explicit owner lanes expose ripple_amplitude, splice_offset, vortex_strength, tension_strength, balance_void, symmetry_tension, and field_curvature again
keep explicit Explaino selector identity intact and keep explaino_all as a neutral umbrella that does not claim those family-axis controls
preserve the bounded smooth-escape explicit-lane perf repair and keep SampleFractalPoints plus legacy projection callers unchanged
repair the native schema rail so it catches raw shipped-schema owner-lane regressions instead of masking them
close only with focused native proof, runtime publish, published-runtime proof, hostile audit, checkpoint commit, receipts, push, clean tree, and stale-plan cleanup
forbidden_operator_prompts: leave the named Explaino family-axis controls accessible only through explaino_all
rebreak explicit Explaino selector identity while restoring control visibility
rebreak the smooth-escape explicit-lane perf repair while moving the controls back to their owners
claim the native schema rail catches this bug while the loader still normalizes the raw artifact without direct proof
widen this slice into Meta-Basin, Operator-Itinerary, DSL/program-space, generic color expansion, renderer replacement, or a broad engine rewrite
close without commit, machine receipts, hostile-audit proof, runtime publish, published-runtime proof, push, and a clean tree

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Explaino control-surface continuation repair contract validates successfully
The Explaino control-surface continuation phased plan stays synchronized
The Explaino control-surface continuation hostile-audit validator passes
